notes: Minor FPS drop for few seconds after game loaded, but the rest time is perfect
title: Scythe: Digital Edition

notes: Ran into a "Failed to initialize graphics" error with the default driver in Mint. Manually upgraded to version 396 and the game runs amazing. No issues at all.
title: Scythe: Digital Edition

notes:
When trying to start Scythe, I get an error: "Failed to initialize graphics.
Make sure you have DirectX 11 installed, have up to date
drivers for your graphics card and have not disabled
3D acceleration in display settings.
InitializeEngineGraphics failed"

Note that while the Steam system information reports the integrated GPU, this machines does have an GeForce GT 730M as well.  Prefixing the game command with "optirun" *should* cause Scythe to be run on that GPU instead, but it seems that it isn't.
title: Scythe: Digital Edition
